title: Miro's Fading Hum
cover_prompt: A small, round creature with soft, fuzzy edges curled in a nest of twilight-blue moss, eyes half-closed, surrounded by gentle wisps of mist that glow faintly in the dim light. The scene is painted in soft watercolors, with deep purples and blues fading into warm amber at the edges.
lyrics:
[verse]
Mmm aah mmm ooh
Mmm hmm aah ooh
Hmm mmm aah mmm

[verse]
Mmm ooh hmm aah
Aah mmm ooh hmm
Mmm

[verse]
Hmm
Aah

---
style_prompt: Solo female vocal lullaby, humming only, no instruments, no melody variation, sustained warm tones, 58 BPM, extremely intimate, breathy, mouth-closed humming, monotone drone, like breathing set to pitch, meditative, hypnotic, no percussion, pure voice

character.name: Miro
character.identity: A quiet, gentle creature who hums the world to sleep with their steady, fading breath.
character.special: Their hum carries the weight of the night, slowing time until all is still.

about: A lullaby of pure sound, designed to mimic the steady, slowing rhythm of a heartbeat. The minimal, drone-like hums create a sense of safety and entrainment, guiding little ones into deep, restful sleep. Perfect for calming even the most restless minds.
